name: builder-addon-pca
documentation:
# Project Name

A brief description of your project.

## Installation

```bash
pip install project_name
pip install build

functions.name: BUILDER_ADDON_PCA._dev_tools.addon_tasks.deploy.get_configuration
documentation:
Fetch the configuration of the Add-on, used when deploying the Add-on to Add-on-manager.
If a configuration.json file is present in an element, it will use that instead of the default configuration.

functions.name: BUILDER_ADDON_PCA._dev_tools.addon_tasks.utils.get_element_identifier_from_path
documentation: Used from inside an element to get its identifier from addon.json

functions.name: BUILDER_ADDON_PCA._dev_tools.addon_tasks.utils.topological_sort
documentation:
Topological sort algorithm.
\:param graph: a dictionary of nodes and their dependencies
\:return: a list of nodes in topological order

functions.name: BUILDER_ADDON_PCA._dev_tools.addon_tasks.utils.generate_schema_default_dict
documentation:
Recursively generate a valid instance dictionary from a given JSON schema
that includes only the fields that are required or have a default value.

```
param schema

The JSON schema dictionary.

param path

The path to the current position in the schema (for nested objects).

return

A valid instance dictionary according to the schema.
```

functions.name: BUILDER_ADDON_PCA._dev_tools.addon_tasks.logs.print_all_log_files
documentation: Get the log files from the Add-on Manager

functions.name: BUILDER_ADDON_PCA._dev_tools.addon_tasks.logs.print_logs
documentation: Get the latest logs from the Add-on Manager
